extension.description: Open the selected Explorer file or folder in the system terminal or a configured terminal tool.
command.openInSystemTerminal.title: Open in System Terminal
command.openInCustomTerminal.title: Open in Custom Terminal
configuration.title: Open External Terminal
configuration.customTerminalPath.descrip: Path or command name of the custom terminal executable, for example wt.exe, powershell.exe, cmd.exe, WezTerm.exe, alacritty, or /Applications/iTerm.app.
configuration.customTerminalArgs.descrip: Arguments passed to the custom terminal. Use ${cwd} as the selected folder path placeholder. If omitted, the terminal process starts with cwd set to the selected folder.
